seoTitle: Miamley vs Micalo Island — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Miamley and Micalo Island. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Miamley vs Micalo Island: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Miamley and Micalo Island.
heading: Miamley vs Micalo Island — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Miamley, New South Wales and Micalo Island, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Miamley has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Micalo Island (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Miamley or Micalo Island safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Miamley has a flood risk score of 39/100, while Micalo Island scores 31/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Miamley scores 32/100 for bushfire risk. Micalo Island scores 16/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Miamley or Micalo Island?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Miamley has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.18% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
